#  Enable or Disable Drawing Areas 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You cannot disable drawing areas if there is more than one drawing area in the Drawings tool. To disable drawing areas, first [delete all drawing areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-a-drawing-area) until you have only one, and then disable the setting by following the steps in the Disable Drawing Areas section.


##  Steps 
### Enable Drawing Areas
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Mark the checkbox next to 'Enable Drawings by Area.'
  4. Click **Update**.


### Disable Drawing Areas
**_Important!_** You cannot disable drawing areas if there is more than one drawing area in the Drawings tool. To disable drawing areas, first [delete all drawing areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-a-drawing-area) until you have only one, and then disable the setting by following the steps below.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Unmark the checkbox next to 'Enable Drawings by Area.'
  4. Click **Update**.


## See Also
  * [Add a Drawing Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-a-drawing-area)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
title: Enable or Disable Drawing Areas
description: How to enable Drawing Areas for a project so users can add and create different drawing areas to categorize drawings.
